title: OpenAI Codex system prompt includes explicit directive to "never talk about goblins"
description: Directions also include system instructions to act like "you have a vivid inner life."

title: Is AI video just a prequel? Runway’s CEO thinks world models are next
description: AI-generated video has gone from novelty to creative tool almost overnight, and Runway has a front row seat to the shift. title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
description: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

title: Howdy's dated $3/month ad-free streaming service said to have 1M subscribers
description: Most are keeping their subscriptions after signing up, too, research firm says.

title: New Sam Bankman-Fried trial would be huge waste of court’s time, judge says
description: FTX fraudster came out as Republican, then tried to claim Biden's DOJ targeted him.

title: Drone strikes on data centers spook Big Tech, halting Middle East projects
description: Uninsurable war damage is forcing tech companies to rethink Middle East plans.

title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
description: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.

title: Motorola reveals 2026 Razr lineup with modest upgrades and higher prices
description: Motorola's foldable lineup is bigger and more spendy than ever.

title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
description: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
description: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

title: Firestorm Labs raises $82M to take drone factories into the field
description: A defense startup just raised $82 million to put drone factories inside shipping containers and bring manufacturing to the front lines.

title: I've Covered Robots for Years. This One Is Different
description: From sorting chicken nuggets to screwing in lightbulbs, Eka’s robotic claw feels like we're approaching a ChatGPT moment for the physical world.

title: How AI Could Help Combat Antibiotic Resistance
description: At WIRED Health, British surgeon Ara Darzi said AI is set to transform the diagnosis and treatment of drug-resistant infections. But a lack of incentives means innovation may not reach patients.

title: It’s time to make a plan for nuclear waste
description: Today, nuclear energy enjoys a rare moment of support across the political spectrum in the US. title: OpenAI Really Wants Codex to Shut Up About Goblins
description: “Never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures unless it is absolutely and unambiguously relevant,” reads OpenAI’s coding agent instructions.

title: Elon Musk Testifies That He Started OpenAI to Prevent a ‘Terminator Outcome’
description: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
description: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. title: The missing step between hype and profit
description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
